name: Stuffed Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked wild rice (a mixture of black japonica, brown, and long grain white)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the apple cider, sauté onion and garlic until onion is soft.
2. Add rice, raisins, and additional cider. Heat gently for a few minutes to let flavors meld.
3. Core the cabbage and plunge into hot water for a few minutes to loosen leaves. Peel off about a dozen leaves.
4. Spread a layer of sauce in the bottom of a pan.
5. Roll the cabbage leaves around the rice mixture by placing a tablespoon or so of the mixture in the center, folding up the sides, and rolling tightly.
6. Place the rolled cabbage on top of the sauce.
7. Repeat layers with sauce, additional rolls, and ending with sauce.
8. Cover and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C) oven.
Tangy Tomato Sauce
